tasks.subject: Task 1: Add request_id helper and single-attempt webhook sender
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `_get_or_create_failure_request_id` + `_send_webhook_once` helpers + `import uuid`.

**Files:** crawler_manager.py, test_crawler_manager.py

**Acceptance:** 4 tests pass

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestWebhookIdempotency -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestWebhookIdempotency -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uuid imported", "2 helpers added", "4 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: _send_failure_webhook accepts request_id and shutdown flag
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update `_send_failure_webhook` to accept `request_id` + `shutdown` kwargs. Route through `_send_webhook_once(timeout=5.0)` when `shutdown=True`.

**Files:** crawler_manager.py, test_crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new kwargs added", "request_id in params", "shutdown routing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Thread request_id through all 6 failure-webhook callsites
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all 6 callsites: OOM max-restarts, OOM relaunch failure, monitor, force-finish, shutdown, reconciliation. Generate request_id before set_json, pass to webhook. Shutdown path uses shutdown=True.

**Files:** crawler_manager.py, test_crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 6 callsites updated", "shutdown=True on shutdown path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Set Docker stop_grace_period to 30s
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `stop_grace_period: 30s` on the crawler-service service.

**Files:** docker-compose.yml

**Verify:** `python -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('docker-compose.yml')); print('YAML OK')"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docker-compose.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('docker-compose.yml')); print('YAML OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stop_grace_period added", "YAML parses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Document failure webhook idempotency in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New section documenting client request_id + PHP dedup contract.

**Files:** apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md

**Verify:** `grep -q 'failure_webhook_request_id' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q 'failure_webhook_request_id' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["section added", "PHP contract documented", "spec link"]}
```
